channel.title: NPR Topics: Health
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Tick season is getting worse. Can managing deer help?
item.description: Health officials and researchers hope that efforts to control deer populations, which serve as "party buses" for mating ticks, can reverse the tide of ticks and the illnesses they cause.
item.content:encoded:
Health officials and researchers hope that efforts to control deer populations, which serve as "party buses" for mating ticks, can reverse the tide of ticks and the illnesses they cause.

(Image credit: Mary Swift/iStockphoto)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: It's toys vs. tech in 'Toy Story 5.' Here are 4 ways to keep tech in check this summer
item.description: Kids' screen use goes way up in the summertime. And just as the movie Toy Story 5 portrays, that can be problematic for children. Here are tips for parents to help their kids manage screens and have fun IRL this summer.
item.content:encoded:
Toy Story 5. It opens in theaters on Friday, June 19.'/>

Kids' screen use goes way up in the summertime. And just as the movie Toy Story 5 portrays, that can be problematic for children. Here are tips for parents to help their kids manage screens and have fun IRL this summer.

(Image credit: Disney/Pixar)
item.dc:creator: Rhitu Chatterjee

item.title: FDA committee unanimously recommends first mRNA flu vaccine
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration's top vaccine advisory committee voted Thursday to recommend an mRNA influenza vaccine. It's the first flu vaccine that uses the same technology as COVID-19 shots.
item.content:encoded: The Food and Drug Administration's top vaccine advisory committee voted Thursday to recommend an mRNA influenza vaccine. It's the first flu vaccine that uses the same technology as COVID-19 shots.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: Key FDA committee unanimously recommends its first vaccine since 2023
item.description: All nine members of the committee unanimously voted to recommend Moderna's new mRNA influenza vaccine for adults 50 and over.
item.content:encoded:
All nine members of the committee unanimously voted to recommend Moderna's new mRNA influenza vaccine for adults 50 and over.

(Image credit: Visoot Uthairam/Moment RF)
item.dc:creator: Joseph Kim

item.title: You're probably using too many skin care products. Here are the 3 essentials
item.description: We asked half a dozen skin care experts: Which products do you really need to keep your skin healthy and attractive? Here's what they said.
item.content:encoded:
'/>

We asked half a dozen skin care experts: Which products do you really need to keep your skin healthy and attractive? Here's what they said.
item.dc:creator: Kelle Walsh

item.title: These 3 brothers lost their parents to AIDS. Now they struggle to make it on their own
item.description: Three brothers say their mother and father died after losing access to their HIV medications. Now the boys are figuring out how to navigate life.
item.content:encoded:
Three brothers say their mother and father died after losing access to their HIV medications. Now the boys are figuring out how to navigate life.

(Image credit: Andy Higgins for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Gabrielle Emanuel

item.title: As America turns 250, one museum makes history possible to touch
item.description: Federal law requires most museums and other buildings to be accessible to people with disabilities. But access to what's actually inside is often still limited.
item.content:encoded:
Federal law requires most museums and other buildings to be accessible to people with disabilities. But access to what's actually inside is often still limited.

(Image credit: Rachel Wisniewski for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jonaki Mehta

item.title: Pakistan ends 'luxury tax' on menstrual products, contraceptives. Will prices drop?
item.description: In Pakistan, taxes on menstrual products can add up. Activists have long worked to change this. Now a new budget wipes out the 18% sales tax. But questions remain about the impact on prices.
item.content:encoded:
In Pakistan, taxes on menstrual products can add up. Activists have long worked to change this. Now a new budget wipes out the 18% sales tax. But questions remain about the impact on prices.

(Image credit: Huizeng Hu/Moment RF)
item.dc:creator: Gabrielle Emanuel

item.title: Winning strategy to prevent diabetes and related chronic diseases
item.description: In the U.S., 115 million adults have prediabetes, which is tied to heart disease and other health problems. A 20-year follow-up to a landmark diabetes study shows lifestyle interventions cut the risk.
item.content:encoded: In the U.S., 115 million adults have prediabetes, which is tied to heart disease and other health problems. A 20-year follow-up to a landmark diabetes study shows lifestyle interventions cut the risk.
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: Trump further guts Education Dept. by shifting oversight of special ed, civil rights
item.description: The moves to the federal departments of Health and Human Services and Justice, respectively, would further dismantle an agency that President Donald Trump has vowed to close.
item.content:encoded:
The moves to the federal departments of Health and Human Services and Justice, respectively, would further dismantle an agency that President Donald Trump has vowed to close.

(Image credit: Al Drago)
item.dc:creator: Jonaki Mehta
